meaning: n.自杀,自毁,给自己带来伤害或损失的行为
examples: They are quite susceptible to suicide.
She had committed suicide by hanging herself.
Just look at this newspaper, nothing but robbery, suicide and murder.
An American patriot knows that the Bill of Rights is not a suicide pact.
There were losses there, too: Manuel committed suicide in 1986, and Danko passed away in 1999.
